# auxten.com

> Personal website of Auxten Wang (Pengcheng Wang), Technical Director at ClickHouse, creator of chDB.

## About

Auxten Wang is a database engineer and open source builder based in Singapore. He created chDB — an embedded ClickHouse engine acquired by ClickHouse Inc. in 2024. He builds databases, AI agent tools, and recommendation systems.

## Links

- Website: https://auxten.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/auxten
- Twitter/X: https://twitter.com/auxten
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/auxten/
- Email: auxtenwpc@gmail.com
- Blog: https://auxten.com/blog.html

## Projects

- [chDB](https://github.com/chdb-io/chdb): In-process OLAP SQL engine powered by ClickHouse. 2,630+ stars. Acquired by ClickHouse.
- [CovenantSQL](https://github.com/CovenantSQL/CovenantSQL): Decentralized BFT SQL database. 1,528+ stars.
- [go-sqldb](https://github.com/auxten/go-sqldb): Pure Go SQL database in ~2000 lines. 846+ stars.
- [postgresql-parser](https://github.com/auxten/postgresql-parser): Pure Go PostgreSQL parser. 313+ stars.
- [go-ctr](https://github.com/auxten/go-ctr): Deep learning recommendation framework in Go. 236+ stars.
- [BotsChat](https://botschat.app): Slack-like messaging for AI agents with E2E encryption.
- [MacMate](https://macmate.app): Menu-bar companion for headless Mac deployment.
- [clickmem](https://github.com/auxten/clickmem): Three-layer memory system for AI agents. MCP server.
- [gingko](https://github.com/auxten/gingko): P2P file distribution tool, built at Baidu.
